---
title: "To what extent do swiss sustainability startups adopt the institutionalized corporate vocabulary of incumbents versus maintaning a distinct technical focus?"
subtitle: "Data Mining Project - University of Lucerne"
author: "Vivienne Schegg"
date: "2026-03-27"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
---

# Introduction

# Data Access Pipeline

- **Sampling:** 
- **The Crawler:** 
- **The Scraper:** 

# Data Mining Methodology

- **TF-IDF:**
- **Cosine Similarity:** 
- **Dictionary Construction:** 
# Empirical Results & Visualization

- **Figure 1 (Decoupling):**
- **Figure 2 (Isomorphism Index):** 
- **TF-IDF Analysis:** 

# Discussion and Limitations


# LLM Disclosure Note
